title: Le grand pardon II
overview: The mobster Raymond Bettoun gets out of prison and joins his son Maurice in Miami, a drug trafficker who is about to launch a huge operation.  But he falls into a trap and a war begins in which Raymond will fight a last battle to try to save his son and what remains of his family.
